display.purpose: Hero statements on pre/post-workout screens. One per screen maximum.

headline.purpose: Section headings, exercise names, primary stat values.

title.purpose: Card titles, navigation page headers, secondary stats.

body.purpose: Descriptions, helper text, workout notes. Max 65ch width.

label.purpose: Section kickers, stat labels, metadata. Always uppercase + tracked.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Entry animations (fade-slide-up). Fast deceleration into resting position.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default hover/focus transitions on buttons and inputs.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA. Start Workout, Finish, Submit. 48-56px tall, full teal fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #2dd4bf; color: #09090b; font-family: 'Geist Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 0 20px; height: 56px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease, transform 0.1s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #5eead4; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(45, 212, 191, 0.4); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.99); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary actions. Bordered, transparent fill, zinc text.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: transparent; color: #f4f4f5; font-family: 'Geist Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 0 20px; height: 48px; border: 1px solid #3f3f46; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #52525b; color: #ffffff; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(45, 212, 191, 0.3); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.99); }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.description: Dangerous actions. Reset workout, remove exercise. Rose-tinted border.
components.css: .ds-btn-destructive { background: transparent; color: #fda4af; font-family: 'Geist Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 0 20px; height: 56px; border: 1px solid rgba(251, 113, 133, 0.4); border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-destructive:hover { border-color: #fb7185; color: #fecdd3; } .ds-btn-destructive:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(251, 113, 133, 0.3); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-destructive:active { transform: scale(0.99); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text field. Auth forms, search, exercise filter.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #09090b; color: #f4f4f5; font-family: 'Geist Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 0 16px; height: 48px; width: 100%; border: 1px solid #27272a; border-radius: 8px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #52525b; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #2dd4bf; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(45, 212, 191, 0.2); }

components.name: Exercise Chip
components.description: Horizontal scrolling exercise selector during active workout.
components.css: .ds-chip { background: #18181b; color: #f4f4f5; font-family: 'Geist Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 8px 16px; min-height: 48px; border: 1px solid #27272a; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; text-align: left; transition: transform 0.1s ease; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; } .ds-chip-name { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; } .ds-chip-meta { font-size: 0.75rem; opacity: 0.7; } .ds-chip:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-chip.ds-chip--active { background: #2dd4bf; color: #09090b; border-color: #2dd4bf; }

components.name: Surface Card
components.description: Primary container. Pre-workout hero, today's plan, stats summary.
components.html:
Active workout

Start logging

Log sets, track rest, beat last session.
components.css: .ds-card { background: rgba(24, 24, 27, 0.4); color: #f4f4f5; font-family: 'Geist Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 24px; border: 1px solid #27272a; border-radius: 12px; } .ds-card-label { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #71717a; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.015em; line-height: 1.3; margin: 0 0 4px; } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 0.875rem; color: #a1a1aa; line-height: 1.75; margin: 0; }

components.name: Stat Block
components.description: Compact metric display during active workout (Sets, Volume, Rest).
components.css: .ds-stat { background: rgba(24, 24, 27, 0.6); color: #f4f4f5; font-family: 'Geist Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 16px; border: 1px solid #27272a; border-radius: 8px; } .ds-stat-label { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #71717a; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-stat-value { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; margin: 0; }

components.name: Sticky Header
components.description: Fixed top bar during active workout. Backdrop-blur with border-bottom.
components.css: .ds-header { background: rgba(9, 9, 11, 0.95); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); border-bottom: 1px solid #18181b; padding: 8px 16px 12px; position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 20; font-family: 'Geist Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-header-back { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #a1a1aa; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.15s ease; } .ds-header-back:hover { color: #e4e4e7; } .ds-header-title { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: #f4f4f5; margin: 4px 0 0; }

narrative.overview:
Liftorium's interface is present, pushing, responsive. It doesn't wait for you — it matches your energy between sets. The system is built for sweaty hands gripping a phone in a rack, overhead fluorescents washing out the screen, divided attention between the bar and the display. Every surface is high-contrast, every target oversized, every animation purposeful and fast.

The aesthetic is dark, dense, and direct. Zinc-black surfaces recede; teal accents pull the eye exactly where it needs to go — the next set, the rest timer, the finish button. There is no decoration. There are no illustrations. Information replaces ornamentation.

This system explicitly rejects: bloated fitness apps with ad-stuffed tabs and endless navigation depth; gamified reward loops with badges, streaks, and childish celebration screens; and any surface that asks you to scroll past content to reach your next action.
keyCharacteristics: Dark zinc-950 canvas with teal-400 as the sole accent
Single font family (Geist Variable) across all hierarchy levels
Oversized touch targets (minimum 48px, prefer 56px for primary actions)
Tactile feedback: scale-on-tap, immediate state changes, no choreography
Information density over visual filler — data the lifter needs is always visible

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Teal is the only saturated hue in the product UI. Rose and amber appear exclusively for semantic state (error, warning, pause). If you're reaching for a second accent color, the design has failed.

rules.name: The Weight-Not-Size Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy within a section is expressed through font-weight changes (400 → 600), not size jumps. Size steps are reserved for cross-section hierarchy. Within a card or stat block, weight does the lifting.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: No box-shadow anywhere in the product. Elevation is tonal: zinc-950 (floor) → zinc-900/40 (surface) → zinc-900 (elevated). If something needs to feel lifted, increase its background opacity and sharpen its border.

dos: Do use teal-400 exclusively for actionable elements (buttons, links, active states). It's a signal, not decoration.
Do make every primary action target at least 48px tall, 56px preferred.
Do show previous-session data inline with current input.
Do use active:scale-[0.99] on tappable elements.
Do keep the bottom toolbar fixed and always-visible during active workouts.
Do use zinc-900/40 (translucent) for card backgrounds, never solid zinc-900.
donts: Don't add badges, streaks, achievements, or any gamification elements.
Don't add social features, feeds, comments, or sharing prompts.
Don't add ads, upsell banners, or promotional surfaces that interrupt the logging flow.
Don't use shadows or box-shadow anywhere.
Don't introduce a second accent color beyond teal.
Don't use display-size text (>2.25rem) for anything other than the single hero statement per screen.
Don't put navigation items behind hamburger menus or drawers on mobile.
Don't animate page transitions or orchestrate staggered loads during active workout logging.
Don't use opacity reduction for disabled states.
